Uses of Interface
com.example.getoutthere.repositories.EventRepository.RepositoryCallback

Packages that use EventRepository.RepositoryCallback
Package
Description
com.example.getoutthere.repositories
 

  • Uses of EventRepository.RepositoryCallback in com.example.getoutthere.repositories

    Methods in com.example.getoutthere.repositories with parameters of type EventRepository.RepositoryCallback
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    EventRepository.createEvent(Event event, Uri posterUri, EventRepository.RepositoryCallback<String> callback)
    Creates a new event in Firestore and optionally uploads a poster image (depending on if user uploads one).
    void
    EventRepository.getEventById(String eventId, EventRepository.RepositoryCallback<Event> callback)
    Fetches an event from Firestore using its event ID.
    void
    EventRepository.getEventsByOrganizerId(String organizerId, EventRepository.RepositoryCallback<List<Event>> callback)
    Fetches all events for param organizerId from the Firestore.
    void
    EventRepository.getEventsByOrganizerOrCoOrganizer(String userId, EventRepository.RepositoryCallback<List<Event>> callback)
    Fetches all events where the user is either the primary organizer OR a co-organizer.
    private void
    EventRepository.saveEventToFirestore(Event event, EventRepository.RepositoryCallback<String> callback)
    Saves the event object to Firestore using its event ID.
    void
    EventRepository.updateEvent(Event event, Uri posterUri, EventRepository.RepositoryCallback<Void> callback)
    Updates an existing event in Firestore.
    private void
    EventRepository.uploadPosterAndSave(Event event, Uri posterUri, EventRepository.RepositoryCallback<String> callback)
    Uploads a poster image to Firebase Storage and then saves the event.
